notes: Run E007 only as E007A using --only E007 --output-alias E007=E007A. E007 is now target maintenance margin selection, not risk_fraction optimization. Evaluate 150, 180, 200 in ascending order and adopt the first candidate with maintenance_below_100_count == 0, maintenance_below_130_count == 0, and stop_triggered == false. Interpret min_maintenance_margin_pct and below counts as assumed maintenance margin if each trade immediately reaches SL. Existing E005, E006, and E008 results remain valid.
